caption: Table 108. Document revision history
rows: Updated document title. Updated Table 1: STM32L443xx family device features and peripheral counts. Updated Section 3.15.3: VBAT battery voltage monitoring. Updated Section 3.27: Universal synchronous/asynchronous receiver transmitter (USART). Updated Table 14: STM32L443xx pin definitions. Updated Table 16: Alternate function AF8 to AF15. Updated Table 18: Voltage characteristics. Updated Table 21: General operating conditions. Added Figure 19: VREFINT versus temperature. Updated Table 23: Embedded reset and power control block characteristics. Updated Table 25 to Table 27 and Table 31 to Table 40. Updated Table 40: Low-power mode wakeup timings. Added Table 42: Wakeup time using USART/LPUART. Updated Table 48: MSI oscillator characteristics. Added Table 49: HSI48 oscillator characteristics. Added Figure 26: HSI48 frequency versus temperature. Updated Table 51: PLL, PLLSAI1 characteristics. Updated introduction of Section 6.3.14: I/O port characteristics. Added note to Figure 29: Recommended NRST pin protection. Updated Table 64: Analog switches booster characteristics. Updated Table 65: ADC characteristics. Updated Table 73: VREFBUF characteristics. Updated Table 74: COMP characteristics. Updated Table 90: USB electrical characteristics. Added Section : SWPMI characteristics. Updated Table 106: Package thermal characteristics.

Added 1x LPUART on cover page. Updated Reference Manual title when referring to RM0394. Added Table 3: STM32L443xx modes overview. Updated Table 5: STM32L443xx peripherals interconnect matrix. Added Section 3.24.5: Infrared interface (IRTIM).

Updated baudrate in Section 3.27: Universal synchronous/asynchronous receiver transmitter (USART). Updated Section 6.1.7: Current consumption measurement. Added footnote to Table 58: I/O current injection susceptibility. Updated Table 59: I/O static characteristics. Updated Section 6.3.18: Analog-to-Digital converter characteristics. Added F min in Table 65: ADC characteristics. ADC Updated Table 71: DAC characteristics. Added Ibias parameter in Table 74: COMP characteristics. Updated Section 7: Package information.

Updated DAC terminology in all the document for clarification: single DAC instance (= DAC1) with 2 output channels. Added ECOPACK2® information in Features. Updated Section 3.9.1: Power supply schemes. Added Figure 3: Power-up/down sequence. Updated Clock-out capability in Section 3.11: Clocks and startup. Updated Figure 4: Clock tree. Updated Section 3.14.1: Nested vectored interrupt controller (NVIC). Updated Section 6.3.2: Operating conditions at power- up / power-down. Updated A in Table 24: Embedded internal voltage Coeff reference. Updated Table 59: I/O static characteristics. Added Section 6.3.16: Extended interrupt and event controller input (EXTI) characteristics. Updated Table 71: DAC characteristics.

Added THIN WLCSP in Features. Updated Table 90: USB electrical characteristics Updated Section 7.6: WLCSP64 package information (A064). Updated Section 7.7: WLCSP49 package information (A04Z). Added Section 7.8: WLCSP49 package information (B06U). Updated Section 8: Ordering information.

Added Section 9: Important security notice Updated Table 18: Voltage characteristics Updated Section : Output driving current Updated Table 48: MSI oscillator characteristics Updated Table 55: EMI characteristics for fHSE = 8 MHz and fHCLK = 80 MHz Updated Table 60: Output voltage characteristics Updated Table 74: COMP characteristics Updated Table 79: LCD controller characteristics Added Section 7.1: Device marking Removed Section Device marking from Section 7.2: LQFP100 package information (1L), Section 7.3: UFBGA100 package information (A0C2), Section 7.4: LQFP64 package information (5W), Section 7.5: UFBGA64 package information (A019), Section 7.9: LQFP48 package information (B5), Section 7.10: UFQFPN48 package information (A0B9)
